'''Endwa''' was a fried [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] food. It was served with orange gravy. Good endwa would only slowly slide down the diner's throat.

==Appearances==
*{{GalaxiesAED}}
*''[[I, Jedi]]'' {{Ab|I, Jedi (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
